news.headline: ECB's Nagel: We shouldn't be too hasty in cutting rates.
ECB's Nagel: I don't want to speculate on the December meeting.
Fed's Hammack: Inflation has eased and not yet at the 2% target.
FDA granted rare pediatric disease designation to Omeros' Zaltenibart for C3G treatment. No approved treatment for C3G causing end-stage renal disease in 10 years.
news.summary: In Seattle, Omeros Corporation revealed that zaltenibart (OMS906) has been granted rare pediatric disease designation by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for addressing complement 3 glomerulopathy (C3G), a rare and advancing renal condition affecting primarily children and young adults. C3G, originating from alternative pathway complement dysregulation, lacks an authorized treatment option and frequently results in end-stage renal disease within a decade.

news.headline: TOMI Environmental Solutions, Inc. to discuss Q3 2024 financial results on Oct. 30, 2024, after financial markets close at 4:30 p.m ET.
news.summary: Frederick, Maryland, October 24, 2024 - TOMI Environmental Solutions, Inc. ("TOMI") (NASDAQ: TOMZ), a leading global company focused on disinfection and decontamination solutions, revealed plans to disclose its third-quarter earnings for the period ending September 30, 2024. The financial results will be released after market hours on Wednesday, October 30, 2024, followed by a conference call scheduled for 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day.

news.headline: NextGen Healthcare and OSIS deepen partnership to assist Community Health Centers in U.S., enhancing technology solutions for better patient care.
news.summary: A prominent provider of healthcare technology solutions, NextGen Healthcare, has collaborated with OSIS, a non-profit tech services organization, to bolster their strategic partnership. This alliance aims to assist Federally Qualified Health Centers (FQHCs) and Community Health Centers (CHCs) in leveraging technology to improve patient outcomes and streamline government compliance. OSIS has selected NextGen Healthcare as its Electronic Health Record (EHR) provider. This collaboration promises to enhance services for FQHCs and CHCs, catering to their specific needs, and promoting efficient operations.

news.headline: Precision BioSciences received approval for clinical trial application in Moldova to study PBGENE-HBV for treating chronic hepatitis B.
news.summary: In Durham, North Carolina, Precision BioSciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: DTIL) has been granted Clinical Trial Application (CTA) approval in Moldova for its primary candidate, PBGENE-HBV. This program aims to combat chronic hepatitis B by eradicating cccDNA. Precision BioSciences is a clinical stage gene editing company that leverages its proprietary ARCUS® platform for advanced gene editing endeavors. PBGENE-HBV is their in vivo gene editing therapy for hepatitis B, specifically designed for intricate gene modifications.

news.headline: ECB's Nagel: We're confident of meeting the target by the middle of next year.
First Merchants Corp 3rd Qtr 2024: Net income $48.7M, EPS $0.84. Loans +$15.5M, deposits +$83.7M, assets $18.3B. Non-performing assets 35 basis points. Eff. ratio 53.76%.
news.summary: First Merchants Corporation reported third-quarter 2024 net income of $48.7 million, down from $55.9 million in Q3 2023 and $39.5 million in Q2 2024. Diluted earnings per share were $0.84, compared to $0.94 in Q3 2023. The company's total assets were $18.3 billion, with loans totaling $12.7 billion and deposits at $14.4 billion. Net interest margin was 3.23%, and the efficiency ratio was 53.76%. The Corporation announced the sale of five Illinois branches and certain assets. Additionally, nonperforming assets to total assets were 35 basis points. The net charge-offs for the quarter were $6.7 million, and NPAs and 90+ day delinquent loans totaled $78.4 million. Allowance for Credit Losses - Loans was $187.8 million. Net income available to common stockholders was $48.7 million, with a diluted EPS of $0.84. The company's stock trades on NASDAQ under the symbol FRME.

news.headline: Amphenol Corp (NYSE:APH) shares rise as Q3 earnings surpass estimates. Sales increase by 26% to $4.04B; EPS at 50 cents beats estimate of 45 cents. CEO mentions growth in various markets.
news.summary: Amphenol Corporation (NYSE:APH) exceeded expectations with its fiscal third-quarter earnings report. The company achieved a remarkable 26% year-on-year increase in sales, reaching $4.04 billion, surpassing analysts' projections of $3.80 billion. Additionally, the adjusted earnings per share (EPS) stood at 50 cents, outperforming the estimated 45 cents. CEO R. Adam Norwitt attributed this success to significant organic growth in various markets such as IT datacom, mobile networks, mobile devices, commercial air, and defense, as well as contributions from recent acquisitions. Amphenol maintained strong profitability during the quarter.

news.headline: Hasbro Inc's Q3 sales declined by 15% YoY to $1.281 billion due to eOne film divestiture. CFO aims to improve profitability by 2024.
news.summary: Hasbro Inc (NASDAQ:HAS) reported a 15% year-on-year decline in third-quarter sales, totaling $1.281 billion, slightly below the estimated $1.295 billion by analysts. The drop in revenue was largely attributed to the eOne film divestiture; excluding this, revenue decreased by 9%. In terms of segments, Consumer Products revenue fell by 10%, influenced by discontinued brands, decreased closeouts, and lower-than-expected volume, partially mitigated by new product offerings and strong consumer product licensing. Wizards of the Coast and Digital Gaming revenue also saw a 5% decrease due to growth in MAGIC: THE GATHERING being outweighed by anticipated declines in Licensed and Digital Gaming. This information and more can be found on Benzinga.com, where the full story is available.

news.headline: Avery Dennison (AVY) beats EPS with $2.33 but misses revenues with $2.18 billion in Q3. Analysts lower forecasts.
news.summary: Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE:AVY) released their third-quarter results, revealing an adjusted earnings per share of $2.33, which surpassed the estimated $2.32. However, the quarterly revenues were reported at $2.18 billion, falling short of the expected $2.20 billion according to analysts. Deon Stander, the company's president and CEO, expressed satisfaction with the quarter's performance, highlighting growth in earnings driven by increased volume and productivity improvements. Stander also praised both the Materials and Solutions Groups for their strong financial growth. The Intelligent Labels division showed significant progress, with ongoing robust growth and expanding opportunities, particularly in the Food sector.

news.headline: HomeTrust Bancshares, Inc. reports $13.1M net income in Q3 2024, $40.6M in 9 months, 9% dividend increase, and Hurricane Helene impact.
news.summary: HomeTrust Bancshares, Inc. announced a preliminary net income of $13.1 million for the third quarter of 2024, a rise from $12.4 million in the previous quarter. Quarterly diluted earnings per share increased to $0.76 from $0.73. Annualized return on assets stood at 1.17%, up from 1.13%, while annualized return on equity increased to 9.76% from 9.58%. The company reported a net interest margin of 4.00% down from 4.08%. For the nine months ended September 30, 2024, net income was $40.6 million compared to $36.6 million in the same period in 2023. The company declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.12 per common share, a 9.0% increase over the previous quarter. The Board of Directors attributed the positive financial results to strong net interest margin maintenance and collaborative efforts during Hurricane Helene. Total dividends reached $5.6 million compared to $5.1 million in the prior year. The Company experienced a $4.0 million increase in net income year-over-year.

news.headline: ECB's Nagel: Tariffs could come with severe consequences.

Esquire Financial Holdings reports strong growth in Q3 2024, with net income up by 8.3% reaching $11.4 million. Total loan growth was $36.4 million while total deposits grew by $49.5 million. The company's net interest margin stood at 6.16%.
news.summary: Esquire Financial Holdings, Inc. reported strong operating results for the third quarter of 2024. Net income increased by $873 thousand to $11.4 million, with significant growth in interest earning assets and a net interest margin of 6.16%. Loan growth saw a $36.4 million increase, totaling $1.30 billion, driven by commercial loans nationally. Total deposits rose by $49.5 million to $1.54 billion, with off-balance sheet sweep funds totaling $488 million. Fee income remained stable at $6.1 million. The company maintained strong credit metrics and reserve coverage ratios. Their capital foundation showed CET1 and TCE/TA ratios of 15.39% and 13.05%, respectively. Esquire Bank's efficient balance sheet management strategy and industry-leading performance were highlighted by Chairman Tony Coelho and CEO Andrew C. Sagliocca. The news article details performance metrics, asset quality, earnings, balance sheet composition, and forward-looking statements, showcasing the company's positive financial outlook and growth.

news.headline: Weyerhaeuser stock predicted to yield 2.51% annual dividend ($500/year) with Q3 earnings expected at 1 cent/share.
news.summary: Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE:WY) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings after the market closes on Thursday, October 24. Analysts are anticipating earnings of 1 cent per share for this quarter, a significant decrease from the 33 cents per share reported in the same period last year. Revenue is projected to be $1.68 billion, down from $2.02 billion a year ago according to data from Benzinga Pro.On October 15, Truist Securities analyst Michael Roxland maintained a Hold rating on Weyerhaeuser and increased the price target from $31 to $34. The company's current annual dividend yield stands at 2.51%, with a quarterly dividend of 20 cents per share ($0.80 annually). Many investors are keeping a close watch on Weyerhaeuser amid speculations about potential gains from dividends offered by the company. Further details are available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: ServiceNow reports Q3 revenue of $2.797 billion and beats earnings estimate with $3.72 per share, analysts raise forecasts.
news.summary: ServiceNow Inc (NYSE:NOW) announced its third-quarter results, surpassing expectations with revenue reaching $2.797 billion, exceeding the estimated $2.743 billion. Adjusted earnings for the quarter stood at $3.72 per share, surpassing analyst predictions of $3.46 per share. The company's CEO, Bill McDermott, expressed satisfaction with the results and noted the positive momentum propelled by both existing and new clients investing in ServiceNow's AI platform for business transformation. As a result, the company raised its full-year guidance due to the strong performance in Q3, showcasing growth beyond anticipated levels.

news.headline: Versa's SSE and ZTNA earn "AAA" ratings in CyberRatings.org tests. SSE achieves a 99.96% protection rate.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on October 24, 2024, Versa's Security Services Edge (SSE) has been recognized for achieving an impressive overall protection rate of 99.96% in blocking exploits, malware, and evasions. This achievement was validated by CyberRatings.org, a non-profit organization focused on instilling trust in cybersecurity solutions. This notable accomplishment demonstrates the effectiveness of Versa's SSE in safeguarding against cyber threats.

news.headline: Unilever's Natura's® celebrates partnership with Global Foodbanking Network for National Food Day; promotes food security.
news.summary: Englewood Cliffs, New Jersey - On October 24, 2024, Natura's®, a well-known brand offering Central American tomato sauce and refried beans, is commemorating National Food Day by showcasing its continued collaboration with The Global Foodbanking Network (GFN). This partnership aims to enhance food security and diminish food waste worldwide.

news.headline: DCA warns Brazilians about malware on piracy sites during Copa do Brasil. 5x more likely to face security issues.
news.summary: A recent warning from the Digital Citizens Alliance (DCA) cautions Brazilians that accessing free content online often leads to consequences, with visitors to piracy sites being 5 times more prone to encountering digital security problems. Released on October 24, 2024, the alert emphasizes the importance of taking active steps to address this issue.

news.headline: Fed's Hammack: Inflation has eased notably but hasn't returned to goal.
Mexico's RegTech industry to grow at 17.5% CAGR by 2028, reaching US$977.92 million by 2029 as per ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A recent report on Mexico's RegTech business and investment opportunities has been released, offering insights on key performance indicators. The regtech industry in Mexico is projected to experience a 26.8% annual growth rate, reaching an estimated value of US$437.27 million by 2024. This growth is anticipated to continue steadily throughout the forecast period, indicating promising prospects for the sector. The report provides detailed information on market size, industry segments, technology trends, product types, deployment strategies, and market share analysis.

news.headline: Baird Medical presented Microwave Ablation tech at ACS Clinical Congress in 2024, held at Moscone Center in New York.
news.summary: Baird Medical, a prominent company listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol BDMD, showcased its expertise in minimally invasive microwave ablation (MWA) technology at the esteemed 2024 American College of Surgeons (ACS) Clinical Congress in New York on October 24th. The event took place at the illustrious Moscone Center and attracted a large audience. Baird Medical's participation was a success, highlighting its leading position in the field.

news.headline: Sporttrade's iOS App launches in Virginia, their fifth state, offering a premium player experience. PHILADELPHIA, Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: Residents of Virginia can now enjoy a premium player experience as Sporttrade, a sports betting operator from Philadelphia, has launched its Sporttrade iOS App in the state on October 24, 2024. This marks Sporttrade's expansion into its fifth state. Virginia residents will have access to exclusive features, as Sporttrade aims to provide a unique betting experience.

news.headline: Online auction on Nov 5 by Tiger Group will feature 900+ lots of production rental gear from PRG in Van Nuys, California.
news.summary: An upcoming auction by Tiger Group on November 5th will showcase a wide array of items including digital cameras, lenses, consoles, projectors, moving lights, truss, and more. Taking place in Van Nuys, California, the auction will feature over 900 lots from PRG's remarkable collection. This event presents a unique opportunity to bid on high-quality equipment and gear for various needs.

news.headline: Stoic Equity Partners acquires flex industrial complex in Springdale, AR on Old Wire Road. Arkansas acquisition announced.
news.summary: A commercial real estate investment group from Daphne, Alabama has disclosed the purchase of a flex industrial complex located on Old Wire Road in Springdale, Arkansas. The acquisition was reported by Stoic Equity Partners on October 24, 2024.

news.headline: Rare Earth Insurance Partners Shanghai established as first independent wholesale insurance broker in mainland China.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, Rare Earth Insurance Partners Shanghai, known as Rare Earth Shanghai, was established in mainland China. The company, led by industry experts Wang Wei and Mark Gu, is positioned as mainland China's inaugural autonomous wholesale insurance broker.

news.headline: Robert Mayes appointed as Senior Managing Director at Ferguson Partners, a talent management firm. (Words: 25)
news.summary: A seasoned professional with twenty years of experience in the industry is set to lead Ferguson's executive search practice on the west coast. The appointment was made by Ferguson Partners (Ferguson), a prominent talent management and strategic advisory firm serving global real assets sectors. The announcement was made on October 24, 2024, in Los Angeles.

news.headline: Splash Box Marketing and Safman Consulting discuss workplace challenges for people with disabilities during National Disability Employment Awareness Month.
news.summary: In Hendersonville, Tennessee on October 24, 2024, Juliana Hale from Splash Box Marketing engaged in a conversation with Marc Safman from Safman Consulting to mark National Disability Employment Awareness Month (NDEAM). The discussion focused on the obstacles encountered by individuals with disabilities in the workforce.

news.headline: MRS research detects more abnormalities post mild traumatic brain injuries, aiding over 2.5M US ED visits yearly.
news.summary: In the United States, there are more than 2.5 million emergency department visits every year due to Traumatic Brain Injury (TBI). Cutting-edge software is now identifying previously unrecognized progressive symptoms. This discovery was made in Boston on October 24, 2024. BrainSpec, a sophisticated software platform, allows virtual biopsies to be conducted, aiding in this newfound capability.

news.headline: ZwickRoell introduces Testing Assistant ALEX at testXpo 32nd International Expo for Materials Testing, enhancing efficiency and precision, ULM, Germany and KENNESAW, Ga., Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: Introducing ALEX, the latest innovation by ZwickRoell presented at testXpo 32nd International Expo for Materials Testing in ULM, Germany and KENNESAW, Ga. ALEX aims to revolutionize laboratory automation by offering a space-saving, cost-effective solution for improved efficiency and precision. The unveiling of ALEX at the expo showcased its potential to enhance operations, attracting attention with its cutting-edge technology. With testXpo being a prominent platform for industry innovation, ALEX's introduction marks a significant step forward in the field. This innovation promises to redefine laboratory processes and its impressive features have stirred interest among attendees.

news.headline: Ladder Capital Corp reports $28.5M GAAP income, $0.22 EPS, $37.7M distributable earnings for Q3 2024.
news.summary: In New York, Ladder Capital Corp (NYSE: LADR) reported its quarterly operating results for the period ending September 30, 2024. The company disclosed a GAAP income before taxes of $28.5 million and a diluted earnings per share of $0.22 for the three-month period. Distributable earnings stood at $37.7 million, translating to $0.30 of distributable EPS. Ladder emphasized its consistent delivery of strong earnings and returns for its shareholders during the quarter.

news.headline: Unemployment claims drop as hurricane impact diminishes, showing steady recovery.
IMF warns China future growth may be below 4% without action.
Palantir's stock surge raises concerns on Wall Street as AI firm's valuation reaches new heights.
Vote early in most states before Election Day through in-person or mail ballots; visit USA.gov for details.
news.summary: You have the opportunity to vote before Election Day in many states. Early voting, whether in person or by mail, is an option available to eligible voters. To find out more about early voting opportunities in your state, visit USA.gov. Many states do not require a...

news.headline: World's largest indoor pickleball entity, Pickleball Kingdom, adds first Arkansas location in Little Rock, marking expansion milestone.
news.summary: In a statement released on Oct. 24, 2024, Pickleball Kingdom, the leading indoor pickleball organization worldwide, revealed plans for its inaugural site in Arkansas. The new facility is set to open in Little Rock, signifying a significant achievement for Pickleball Kingdom as it branches out into the state.

news.headline: $8.5 billion opportunity for grocery media networks. 68% of grocers prioritize investment. New study by Grocery Doppio.
news.summary: According to a recent study conducted by Grocery Doppio in collaboration with RRD, 68% of grocers consider investing in a media network a top priority. The study, titled "The State of Digital Grocery: In-Store Media Monetization," reveals that a significant majority of retailers are focusing on this area. This information was released on October 24, 2024, in Jacksonville, Florida.

news.headline: SecureCyber ranked #110 in MSSP Alert's 2024 Top 250 MSSPs List, showcasing dedication to cybersecurity excellence.
news.summary: SecureCyber, based in MORAINE, Ohio, revealed on October 24, 2024, that they have been recognized for their continuous innovation and commitment to cybersecurity excellence. As a top Managed Security Services Provider, they focus on proactive threat intelligence, round-the-clock cyber defense, response services, and personalized solutions. This recognition underscores their dedication to staying at the forefront of cybersecurity advancements.

news.headline: Foreclosurelistings.com suggests Trump's re-election could benefit U.S. foreclosure market due to economic strategies.
news.summary: In Miami on October 24, 2024, experts express optimism about the potential impact of Donald Trump's victory in the 2024 election on the U.S. foreclosure market. His economic strategy, which involves tax cuts, deregulation, and keeping interest rates low, is expected to bring positive changes. Analysts believe that if Trump is re-elected, these policies could lead to a favorable outcome for the  foreclosure market in the country.

news.headline: Orthopedic surgeon Dr. Gabriel Dassa excels, opens new location, attracting loyal patients worldwide.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, in New York, Dr. Gabriel Dassa, a highly esteemed orthopedic and hand surgeon, has long been recognized as a top professional in the field. His clinics demonstrate exceptional performance in healthcare and consistently draw in devoted patients who journey from various locations for treatments.

news.headline: Neway Works to host 3rd annual Let's Shine Gala on Nov. 22, 2024, with Nick Monacelli.
news.summary: Mount Clemens, Michigan - On October 24, 2024, Neway Works, Inc. revealed details about their upcoming 3rd Annual Let's Shine Gala. The event will be led by WDIV Click on Detroit's Nick Monacelli as the Master of Ceremonies. Scheduled for Friday, November 22nd, the gala will be held at the prestigious Edsel and Eleanor Ford venue.

news.headline: Weather Engineers, based in Jacksonville, celebrates 61 years; family-owned HVAC leader, founded in 1963, expands in North Florida.
news.summary: Celebrating its 61st anniversary this year, Weather Engineers, a renowned family-owned HVAC services provider based in Jacksonville, Florida, has been delivering exceptional heating, ventilation, and air services since its establishment in 1963. The company has become a leader in the industry with a strong dedication to quality.

news.headline: UPS ends revenue-miss streak with Q3 results: $22.2B revenue (5.6% growth), $1.76 EPS (12.1% YoY increase). Stock soars.
news.summary: UPS stock (NYSE:UPS) is up following the release of their third-quarter results that surpassed expectations. The company saw a 5.6% year-over-year increase in consolidated revenue, reaching $22.2 billion, exceeding the projected $22.14 billion. Adjusted EPS also performed well at $1.76, up 12.1% from last year and surpassing the estimated $1.63. The quarter’s GAAP results included a net after-tax benefit of $36 million, or $0.04 per share, driven by a $152 million gain from the Coyote Logistics divestiture, despite $116 million in transformation costs. Additionally, consolidated operating profit experienced a significant rise of 47.8% YoY, totaling $1.983 billion. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Recycling company reveals Q4 & FY 2024 financial numbers.
Legend Biotech will host a conference call on Nov 12, 2024, to discuss Q3 2024 results at 8:00 am ET.
news.summary: In Somerset, New Jersey, on October 24, 2024, Legend Biotech Corporation (NASDAQ: LEGN), a prominent player in cell therapy worldwide, is set to conduct an investor conference call at 8:00 am ET on November 12, 2024. The purpose of the call is to discuss the results of the third quarter of 2024.

news.headline: LifeMD, Inc. (Nasdaq: LFMD) will report Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 7 after U.S. markets close. Conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET.
news.summary: LifeMD, Inc., a prominent provider of virtual primary care services listed on Nasdaq as LFMD, is set to disclose its financial performance for the three and nine months concluded on September 30, 2024, once U.S. financial markets close on November 7, 2024. Moreover, the company will conduct a conference call starting at 4:30 p.m. Eastern time on the same day.

news.headline: ACNB Corporation Q3 2024: Net income $7.2M, $0.84 EPS, decreased from $9M, $1.06 EPS in Q3 2023 & $11.3M, $1.32 EPS in Q2 2024.
news.summary: ACNB Corporation, a financial holding company for ACNB Bank and ACNB Insurance Services, Inc., reported a net income of $7.2 million and $0.84 diluted earnings per share for the three months ending September 30, 2024. This is a decrease from the $9.0 million and $1.06 diluted earnings per share reported for the same period in 2023, and also lower than the $11.3 million and $1.32 diluted earnings per share for the three months ending June 30, 2024. The financial results for the quarter ending September 30, 2024, were affected by $1.1 million in merger-related expenses attributed to the pending acquisition of Traditions Bancorp, Inc. Additionally, the results for the quarter ending June 30, 2024, were impacted by a $3.2 million reversal of provisions for credit losses and unfunded commitments.

news.headline: HomeTrust Bancshares, Inc. reveals Q3 preliminary net income, plans to hike quarterly cash dividend.
news.summary: HomeTrust Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: HTBI) based in Asheville, North Carolina, disclosed their initial net income figures for the third quarter of the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company, which operates HomeTrust Bank, also declared a rise in their quarterly cash dividend.

news.headline: West Bancorporation, Inc. reports Q3 2024 net income of $6.0 million, declares dividend of $0.25 per share.
news.summary: In West Des Moines, Iowa, West Bancorporation, Inc. (Nasdaq: WTBA), the parent company of West Bank, disclosed its third quarter financial results on October 24, 2024. The company reported a net income of $6.0 million for Q3 2024, translating to $0.35 per diluted common share. This marks a rise from the second quarter of 2024, where net income was $5.2 million ($0.31 per diluted common share), but a slight increase from the third quarter of 2023, which reported $5.9 million in net income ($0.35 per diluted common share).Additionally, on October 23, 2024, the Board of Directors announced a regular quarterly dividend of $0.25 per common share. This dividend will be paid out on November 20, 2024, to shareholders of record as of November 6, 2024.
